badges.browserConflictHint: Browsers may intercept this key before the workspace receives it. Use the secondary binding when available.
badges.fnKeyHint: Turn Fn lock off on your keyboard to use function keys like Excel.

badges.lowReliabilityHint: This binding may not fire consistently across browsers or keyboard layouts.
badges.productLockedHint: This command binding is fixed by the product and cannot be changed.

errors.reservedBrowserKey: F5, F11, and F12 are reserved by the browser.

capture.pressEsc: Press Esc to cancel without saving.
